ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity metric entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "popularity_score" TEXT /* Popularity score of the product */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend in popularity (e.g., Up, Down, Stable) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the product in terms of popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_metrics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sales_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total sales that this product accounts for */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales data was recorded */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated by the product */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_position" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market position entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "position_trend" TEXT /* Trend in market position (e.g., Up, Down) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position trend was recorded */,
  "market_share" TEXT /* Market share of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_position_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "predicted_popularity_score" TEXT /* Predicted popularity score of the product */,
  "predicted_sales_percentage" TEXT /* Predicted sales percentage of the product */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal trend entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., Winter, Summer) */,
  "sales_percentage_increase" TEXT /* Percentage increase in sales during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
